# Crim Model

**Summary**: Complex Refractive Index Method, used to relate dielectric constant to porosity and water content.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] used the CRIM model to link GPR velocity to porosity and water saturation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] It is used to relate GPR velocity to the physical properties of the medium.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024]] Analytical calculation using the CRIM formula.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The CRIM model provided a robust way to calculate Vg from phi and Sw. ([[2024-alkhunaizi|Alkhunaizi, 2024, p. 35]])
